message:
Lỗi đồng bộ: (psycopg2.errors.UniqueViolation) duplicate key value violates unique constraint "province_pkey"
DETAIL:  Key (province_id)=(5) already exists.

[SQL: INSERT INTO mat.province (area_id, bonus_area_id, country_id, province_no, province_name, type_name, is_default, created_user, created_date, updated_user, updated_date, is_deleted, province_name_en, province_no, served_radius, north_pole_lat, north_pole_lng, east_pole_lat, east_pole_lng, south_pole_lat, south_pole_lng, west_pole_lat, west_pole_lng, admin_version, population, area_km2, decision_number, decision_date, notes) VALUES (%(area_id)s, %(bonus_area_id)s, %(country_id)s, %(province_no)s, %(province_name)s, %(type_name)s, %(is_default)s, %(created_user)s, now(), %(updated_user)s, now(), %(is_deleted)s, %(province_name_en)s, %(province_no)s, %(served_radius)s, %(north_pole_lat)s, %(north_pole_lng)s, %(east_pole_lat)s, %(east_pole_lng)s, %(south_pole_lat)s, %(south_pole_lng)s, %(west_pole_lat)s, %(west_pole_lng)s, %(admin_version)s, %(population)s, %(area_km2)s, %(decision_number)s, %(decision_date)s, %(notes)s) RETURNING mat.province.province_id, mat.province.created_date, mat.province.updated_date]
[parameters: {'area_id': None, 'bonus_area_id': None, 'country_id': 0, 'province_no': 1, 'province_name': 'Thành phố Hà Nội', 'type_name': 'Thành phố Trung ương', 'is_default': True, 'created_user': 0, 'updated_user': 0, 'is_deleted': False, 'province_name_en': None, 'province_no': '01', 'served_radius': None, 'north_pole_lat': None, 'north_pole_lng': None, 'east_pole_lat': None, 'east_pole_lng': None, 'south_pole_lat': None, 'south_pole_lng': None, 'west_pole_lat': None, 'west_pole_lng': None, 'admin_version': 2, 'population': None, 'area_km2': None, 'decision_number': None, 'decision_date': None, 'notes': None}]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/gkpj)
